recipes.name: Cannabutter
recipes.description: Elevate your culinary creations with the magic of cannabutter. Infuse dishes with a touch of euphoria for a truly unique dining experience.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup unsalted butter (2 sticks)
  • ½ cup water (add more water at any time if needed)
  • 7 ground weed
recipes.instructions:
• Decarb your weed - Learn how
  • Add ½ cup of water and 2 sticks (½ lb) of butter in a saucepan and bring to a simmer on low to medium heat. Adding water helps to regulate the temperature and prevents the butter from scorching. As butter begins to melt, add in ground weed.
  • Maintain low heat and let the mixture simmer for 2-3 hours, stirring occasionally. Make sure the mixture never comes to a full boil.
  • Pour the hot mixture into a glass container, using a cheesecloth to strain out all ground weed from the butter mixture. Squeeze or press the plant material to get as much liquid out of the weed as possible. Discard leftover weed.
  • Cover and refrigerate remaining liquid overnight or until the butter is fully hardened. Once hardened, the butter will separate from the water, allowing you to lift the cannabutter out of the container. Discard remaining water after removing the hardened cannabutter.
  • Note that the cannabutter in the container should have a slightly green tinge from the cannabis. Now you are ready to make some cannabis-infused meals!

recipes.name: Infused Coconut oil
recipes.description: With its rich, tropical flavor and the delightful infusion of cannabis, this versatile oil elevates your cooking to new heights.
recipes.ingredients:
• ½ cup of coconut oil
  • 3.5 ground weed
recipes.instructions:
• Decarb your weed - Learn how to do
  • Add the weed to a canning jar with ½ cup of coconut oil.
  • Seal the canning jar very tightly.
  • Add the canning jar in boiling water using low-medium (240° F - 115° C) heat for over 2 hours.
  • Put all the jar's content into a cheesecloth over a metal strainer.
  • Gather the cheesecloth and squeeze all the remaining liquid out.

recipes.name: Infused Olive oil
recipes.description: Probably the most versatile medium and a great place to start cooking with cannabis.
recipes.ingredients:
• 300 ml of olive oil
  • 8 ground weed
recipes.instructions:
• Decarb your weed - Learn how to do
  • Grind your weed fine, you want to make a good surface area of exposure.
  • Add the ground weed to a canning jar with 300 ml of olive oil.
  • Seal the canning jar very tightly.
  • Add the canning jar in boiling water using low-medium (240° F - 115° C) heat for over 2 hours.
  • Put all the jar's content into a cheesecloth over a metal strainer.
  • Gather the cheesecloth and squeeze all the remaining liquid out.

recipes.name: Infused Bulletproof Coffee
recipes.description: Ignite your senses and fuel your day with focus and balance, all in a single cup.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup brewed coffee
  • 1 tablespoon infused coconut oil
  • 1 tablespoon unsalted butter
  • Sweetener of choice (optional)
recipes.instructions:
• Brew a cup of coffee using your preferred method.
  • In a blender, combine the brewed coffee, unsalted butter, coconut oil, and cannabis-infused coconut oil.
  • Blend on high speed until the mixture is creamy and frothy.
  • Taste and add sweetener if desired.
  • Pour into a mug and enjoy your keto-friendly cannabis-infused bulletproof coffee!

recipes.name: Infused Keto Peanut Butter Cookies
recipes.description: Elevate your cookie game with our keto creation. Enjoy the nutty perfection of peanut butter cookies, guilt-free and tailored for your low-carb lifestyle.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup natural peanut butter (sugar-free)
  • 1/2 cup powdered erythritol or low-carb sweetener of choice
  • 1 large egg
  • 1/2 tsp vanilla extract
  • 2 tbsp infused coconut oil melted
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
  • In a mixing bowl, combine the natural peanut butter, powdered erythritol, egg, vanilla extract, cannabis-infused coconut oil, and salt.
  • Mix until well combined and a dough forms.
  • Scoop tablespoon-sized portions of the dough and roll them into balls.
  • Place the dough balls onto the prepared baking sheet and flatten them with a fork, making a crisscross pattern.
  • Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until the cookies are golden around the edges.
  • Remove from the oven and let the cookies cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
  • Enjoy your delicious cannabis-infused keto peanut butter cookies!

recipes.name: Infused Coconut Fat Bombs
recipes.description: Elevate snacking with nature-infused coconut bliss. Nourish body and mind with each bite-sized gem, crafted for balanced indulgence.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1/2 cup coconut oil, melted
  • 1/2 cup coconut butter
  • 2 tbsp infused coconut oil
  • 2 tbsp unsweetened cocoa powder
  • 1/4 cup powdered erythritol or sweetener of choice
  • 1/2 tsp vanilla extract
  • 1/2 tsp salt
recipes.instructions:
• In a mixing bowl, combine the melted coconut oil, coconut butter, cannabis-infused coconut oil, unsweetened cocoa powder, powdered erythritol, vanilla extract, and salt.
  • Stir until well combined and smooth.
  • Pour the mixture into silicone molds or an ice cube tray.
  • Place in the refrigerator or freezer to solidify for at least 1 hour.
  • Pop the coconut fat bombs out of the molds or ice cube tray.
  • Store the cannabis-infused coconut fat bombs in an airtight container in the refrigerator or freezer.
  • Enjoy one or two fat bombs as a keto-friendly and cannabis-infused snack!

recipes.name: Infused Pesto Pasta
recipes.description: Perfectly cooked spirals coated in aromatic basil pesto, crowned with a delicate sprinkle of Parmesan heaven.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups fresh basil leaves
  • 1/2 cup pine nuts
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1/2 cup infused olive oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 1 pound pasta (e.g., spaghetti, penne, or fusilli)
  • Grated Parmesan cheese for garnish
recipes.instructions:
• In a food processor, combine the fresh basil leaves, pine nuts, grated Parmesan cheese, and minced garlic.
  • Pulse the mixture until it forms a coarse paste.
  • With the food processor running, slowly drizzle in the cannabis-infused olive oil until the pesto becomes smooth and well combined.
  • Season the pesto with salt and pepper to taste. Adjust the seasoning as needed.
  • Cook the pasta according to the package list-group-items until al dente.
  • Drain the cooked pasta, reserving a small amount of the cooking water.
  • In a large mixing bowl, toss the cooked pasta with the cannabis-infused pesto. If needed, add a splash of the reserved cooking water to loosen the sauce.
  • Serve the cannabis-infused pesto pasta with a sprinkle of grated Parmesan cheese on top.
  • Enjoy the flavorful and cannabis-infused pasta dish!

recipes.name: Infused Berry Smoothie
recipes.description: A tantalizing fusion of frozen berries, fruit and greek yogurt. Refreshing, flavorful, and oh-so-delicious.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1-2 teaspoons infused coconut oil
  • 1 cup frozen mixed berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries)
  • 1 ripe banana
  • 1 cup milk (dairy or non-dairy)
  • 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup
  • Optional: a handful of kale for added nutrients
recipes.instructions:
• Place all the ingredients in a blender.
  • Blend on high speed until smooth and creamy.
  • Taste and adjust the sweetness by adding more honey or maple syrup if desired.
  • If the smoothie is too thick, add a little more milk and blend again until desired consistency is reached.
  • Pour the cannabis-infused berry smoothie into glasses and serve immediately.

recipes.name: Infused Energy Bites
recipes.description: Each bite is a heavenly blend of wholesome ingredients, delivering a blissful and invigorating experience for your taste buds and mind.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup rolled oats
  • 1/2 cup nut butter (such as almond butter or peanut butter)
  • 1/3 cup honey or maple syrup
  • 1/4 cup ground flaxseed
  • 1/4 cup mini chocolate chips
  • 1/4 cup shredded coconut
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 tbsp infused coconut oil
  • Pinch of salt
recipes.instructions:
• In a large mixing bowl, combine all the ingredients: rolled oats, nut butter, honey or maple syrup, ground flaxseed, mini chocolate chips, shredded coconut, vanilla extract, cannabis-infused coconut oil, and a pinch of salt.
  • Stir well until all the ingredients are evenly combined.
  • Cover the bowl and place it in the refrigerator for 30 minutes to allow the mixture to firm up.
  • After chilling, remove the mixture from the refrigerator and roll it into small bite-sized balls using your hands.
  • Place the cannabis-infused energy bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
  • Refrigerate the energy bites for another 1-2 hours to set and firm up.
  • Once firm, transfer the energy bites to an airtight container and store them in the refrigerator.
  • Enjoy the cannabis-infused energy bites as a nutritious and tasty snack!

recipes.name: Fire Crackers
recipes.description: Easy to make, delicious and extremely potent this recipe is one of the most popular.
recipes.ingredients:
• Graham cracker
  • 3.5 ground weed
  • Hazelnut spread
  • Tin foil
recipes.instructions:
• Place your weed on the foil.
  • Preheat your oven to 250° F.
  • Toast your weed for 10 minutes at 250° F.
  • Cover graham crackers with hazelnut spread.
  • Remove your weed from the oven and sprinkle over the hazelnut spread.
  • Mix weed into the spread and sandwich graham crackers together.
  • Wrap and seal the firecracker in foil.
  • Toast in the oven for 15 minutes at 300° F.

recipes.name: Infused Lemonade
recipes.description: Sip on this invigorating beverage to experience a harmonious balance of tangy citrus notes and the relaxing effects of cannabis
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup freshly squeezed lemon juice
  • 4 cups cold water
  • 1/2 cup granulated sugar
  • 1-2 tsp infused honey
  • Ice cubes
  • Lemon slices for garnish
recipes.instructions:
• In a pitcher, combine the freshly squeezed lemon juice, cold water, granulated sugar, and cannabis-infused honey.
  • Stir well until the sugar is dissolved.
  • Taste the lemonade and adjust the sweetness by adding more sugar or cannabis-infused honey if desired.
  • Add ice cubes to the pitcher to chill the lemonade.
  • Stir again before serving.
  • Pour the cannabis-infused lemonade into glasses and garnish with lemon slices.
  • Sip and enjoy the refreshing and uplifting effects of the cannabis-infused lemonade!

recipes.name: Infused Keto Chocolate Avocado Mousse
recipes.description: Transform dessert time with our avocado-based indulgence. Savor the richness of chocolate-infused bliss, while embracing the natural touch for a truly delectable treat.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 ripe avocados
  • 1/4 cup unsweetened cocoa powder
  • 3 tbsp infused coconut oil
  • 3 tbsp powdered erythritol or sweetener of choice
  • 1/2 tsp vanilla extract
  • Pinch of salt
  • Optional toppings: whipped cream, berries, chopped nuts
recipes.instructions:
• Cut the avocados in half and remove the pits.
  • Scoop the flesh into a blender or food processor.
  • Add the unsweetened cocoa powder, cannabis-infused coconut oil, powdered erythritol, vanilla extract, and salt.
  • Blend until smooth and creamy.
  • Taste and adjust the sweetness if needed.
  • Divide the cannabis-infused chocolate avocado mousse into serving bowls or glasses.
  • Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to chill and set.
  • Before serving, you can top the mousse with whipped cream, berries, or chopped nuts if desired.
  • Enjoy your keto-friendly infused chocolate avocado mousse!

recipes.name: Infused Guacamole
recipes.description: This irresistible guacamole combines creamy avocados, zesty lime juice, diced tomatoes, onions and a delightful herbal twist.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 tbsp infused olive oil
  • 2 ripe avocados
  • 1 tbsp lime juice
  • 1/4 cup finely chopped onion
  • 1/4 cup diced tomatoes
  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Optional: chopped cilantro, diced jalapenos
recipes.instructions:
• Cut the avocados in half, remove the pits, and scoop out the flesh into a bowl.
  • Mash the avocado with a fork until it reaches your desired consistency.
  • Add the lime juice, onion, tomatoes, garlic, cannabis-infused olive oil, salt, and pepper to the bowl. Mix well.
  • Taste and adjust the seasonings as needed.
  • Optional: Stir in chopped cilantro and diced jalapenos for added flavor and heat
  • Serve immediately with tortilla chips or as a topping for tacos, burritos, or sandwiches.

recipes.name: Infused Chocolate Truffles
recipes.description: Experience pure decadence with these luscious chocolate truffles. A euphoric journey through rich, velvety flavors awaits.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1/2 cup cannabis-infused coconut oil
  • 1/2 cup unsweetened cocoa powder
  • 1/4 cup maple syrup
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • Optional coatings: chopped nuts, cocoa powder, shredded coconut
recipes.instructions:
• In a microwave-safe bowl, melt the cannabis-infused coconut oil.
  • Add the unsweetened cocoa powder, maple syrup, vanilla extract, and salt to the melted coconut oil. Stir well until smooth and combined.
  • Place the mixture in the refrigerator for about 1 hour or until firm enough to handle.
  • Scoop small portions of the mixture and roll them into bite-sized truffles using your hands.
  • Roll the truffles in your desired coatings, such as chopped nuts, cocoa powder, or shredded coconut.
  • Place the coated truffles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
  • Refrigerate the truffles for at least 1 hour to set.
  • Serve the cannabis-infused chocolate truffles chilled and enjoy!

recipes.name: Infused Banana Bread
recipes.description: Savor a blend of ripe bananas, expertly selected ingredients, and a special infusion that transforms a classic into a delightful, elevated treat.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1/2 cup cannabis-infused butter, melted
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 2 large eggs
  • 3 ripe bananas, mashed
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 1/2 cups all-purpose flour
  • 1 teaspoon baking soda
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
  • In a large mixing bowl, combine the melted cannabis-infused butter and granulated sugar.
  • Add the eggs, mashed bananas, and vanilla extract. Stir well to combine.
  • In a separate bowl, whisk together the all-purpose flour, baking soda, and salt.
  • Gradually add the dry ingredients to the banana mixture, stirring until just combined. Be careful not to overmix.
  • Pour the batter into the greased loaf pan, spreading it out evenly.
  • Bake in the preheated oven for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
  • Remove the banana bread from the oven and let it cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Then transfer it to a wire rack to cool completely.
  • Slice and enjoy the cannabis-infused banana bread as a delightful and comforting treat!

recipes.name: Infused Keto Cheesecake Bites
recipes.description: Delight in our infused cheesecake bites, a perfect balance of flavor and mindful indulgence.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 1/2 cups almond flour
  • 1/4 cup powdered erythritol or low-carb sweetener of choice
  • 1/4 cup cannabis-infused butter, melted
  • 16 ounces cream cheese, softened
  • 1/2 cup powdered erythritol or low-carb sweetener of choice
  • 2 teaspoons vanilla extract
  • 2 large eggs
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
  • In a bowl, combine the almond flour, powdered erythritol, and melted cannabis-infused butter.
  • Press the mixture into the bottom of a greased square baking pan.
  • Bake the crust in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, then remove from the oven and set aside.
  • In a mixing bowl, beat the softened cream cheese, powdered erythritol, and vanilla extract until smooth and creamy.
  • Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
  • Pour the cream cheese mixture over the baked crust in the baking pan.
  • Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the cheesecake is set and slightly golden.
  • Remove from the oven and let the cheesecake cool to room temperature.
  • Refrigerate the cheesecake for at least 4 hours or overnight to firm up.
  • Cut the chilled cheesecake into bite-sized squares and serve your cannabis-infused keto cheesecake bites.
  • Enjoy these creamy and indulgent treats while sticking to your keto diet!

recipes.name: Infused Keto Cauliflower Pizza Crust
recipes.description: Revolutionize pizza night with a plant-infused cauliflower crust. Delight in nature's goodness, balanced and flavorful in every bite.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 small head cauliflower, riced
  • 1/2 cup shredded mozzarella cheese
  • 2 tbsp almond flour
  • 1 tbsp infused olive oil
  • 1 egg
  • 1/2 tsp dried oregano
  • 1/2 tsp garlic powder
  • 1/4 tsp salt
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat your oven to 425°F (220°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
  • Place the riced cauliflower in a microwave-safe bowl and microwave for 5-6 minutes until tender.
  • Allow the cauliflower to cool slightly, then transfer it to a clean kitchen towel.
  • Wrap the cauliflower in the towel and squeeze out as much liquid as possible.
  • In a mixing bowl, combine the cauliflower, shredded mozzarella cheese, almond flour, cannabis-infused olive oil, egg, dried oregano, garlic powder, and salt.
  • Mix until well combined.
  • Transfer the cauliflower mixture to the prepared baking sheet and shape it into a pizza crust shape.
  • Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until the crust is golden and firm.
  • Remove from the oven and add your desired toppings.
  • Return the pizza to the oven and bake for an additional 8-10 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
  • Slice and enjoy your keto-friendly cannabis-infused cauliflower pizza!

recipes.name: Infused Milk
recipes.description: What about an ice-cold milkshake? Or a whipped topping on some pie? Cannabis-infused milk is a great for these recipes.
recipes.ingredients:
• Milk, Cream, Coconut Milk or Other Milk Substitute
  • 1 ground weed per liter of milk
  • Sauce Pan
  • Whisk
  • Cheesecloth
  • Mason Jar
recipes.instructions:
• Decarb your weed - Learn how to do
  • Grind your weed fine, you want to make a good surface area of exposure.
  • Next, add your finely ground cannabis directly to your milk, place over low heat and whisk to combine. Be careful not to let the mixture boil over!
  • Stir the milk mixture frequently to prevent scorching and allow the cannabis and milk to simmer for 30 minutes to an hour depending on your preferred potency.
  • After 30 minutes to an hour, remove from heat and let sit for 5-10 minutes to help the cannabinoids set into the fat cells.
  • Place cheesecloth over the top of a large mason jar or other air-tight liquid storage container then pour the mixture over the cheesecloth to strain out all plant matter.
  • When it’s cool enough to handle, squeeze all excess liquid from the cheesecloth into your storage container.
  • Tightly seal your container, label with its contents and expiration date (the same date that was listed on the milk container) or freeze in ice cube trays for later use.

recipes.name: Infused Coconut Curry
recipes.description: A delightful fusion of aromatic spices, creamy coconut, and infused cannabis. Elevate your senses with tender veggies and protein in a dish that's truly unforgettable.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 tbsp cannabis-infused coconut oil
  • 1 onion, finely chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon grated fresh ginger
  • 2 tablespoons curry powder
  • 1 can (14 ounces) coconut milk
  • 1 cup vegetable broth
  • 1 cup diced potatoes
  • 2 carrots, sliced
  • 1 red bell pepper, sliced
  • 1 cup cauliflower florets
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Fresh cilantro for garnish
recipes.instructions:
• In a large skillet or pot, heat the cannabis-infused coconut oil over medium heat.
  • Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger. Sauté until the onion becomes translucent and the garlic is fragrant.
  • Stir in the curry powder and cook for an additional minute to toast the spices.
  • Pour in the coconut milk and vegetable broth. Stir well to combine.
  • Add the diced potatoes, sliced carrots, red bell pepper, and cauliflower florets to the pot. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
  • Cover the pot and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
  • Serve the cannabis-infused coconut curry over cooked rice or with naan bread. Garnish with fresh cilantro.

recipes.name: Gummy Bears
recipes.description: If you're a big gummy bear fan, you're in luck!
recipes.ingredients:
• ¼ cup of infused coconut oil with 3.5 grams weed - See the recipe
  • ½ tsp Sunflower/Soy Lecithin
  • 1 oz Unflavored Gelatin
  • ½ cup Water
  • 1 pack 6 oz Jello (any flavor)
  • Gummy Bear mold
recipes.instructions:
• In a small saucepan over medium heat combine the water and the infused oil and whisk together as you bring it to a boil.
  • Whisk in each container of the unflavored gelatin one at a time while continuing to whisk.
  • Whisk in the flavored gelatin and keep stirring for about 5 minutes and bring to a rolling boil.
  • Reduce heat to low, spray molds with cooking spray. Fill each mold to the top with a dropper or spoon. Keep stirring your mix periodically.
  • Place molds in freezer for 20 minutes or fridge for an hour to firm up.
  • Unmold the candies to enjoy right away or store in airtight containers for 2 – 3 days at room temperature. Freeze for extended storage.

recipes.name: Infused Spaghetti Bolognese
recipes.description: This culinary creation takes your taste buds on a euphoric journey, delivering a symphony of taste.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 tbsp infused olive oil
  • 1 onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 carrot, finely chopped
  • 1 celery stalk, finely chopped
  • 1 pound ground beef
  • 1 can (14 ounces) diced tomatoes
  • 1 can (6 ounces) tomato paste
  • 1/2 cup red wine
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • 1 teaspoon dried basil
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Cooked spaghetti noodles
  • Grated Parmesan cheese for garnish
recipes.instructions:
• In a large skillet or pot, heat the cannabis-infused olive oil over medium heat.
  • Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, carrot, and celery to the pot. Sauté until the vegetables are softened.
  • Add the ground beef to the pot and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
  • Stir in the diced tomatoes, tomato paste, red wine, dried oregano, dried basil, salt, and pepper.
  • Simmer the sauce on low heat for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
  • Meanwhile, cook the spaghetti noodles according to the package list-group-items until al dente.
  • Once the sauce is ready, taste and adjust the seasoning if needed.
  • Serve the cannabis-infused Bolognese sauce over the cooked spaghetti noodles.
  • Garnish with grated Parmesan cheese and enjoy a comforting and cannabis-infused meal!

recipes.name: Pot Cookies
recipes.description: Cookies with crisp edges, a rich, buttery, toffee-like flavor, big chocolate chunks.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1/2 cup cannabutter
  • 1/2 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/4 cup brown sugar
  • 2 teaspoons vanilla extract
  • 1 large egg
  • 1 3/4 cups all-purpose flour
  • 1/2 teaspoon baking soda
  • pinch of salt
  • 1 cup chocolate chips
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat the oven to 350 F.
  • Microwave the cannabutter for about 40 seconds. Butter should be completely melted but shouldn't be hot.
  • In a large bowl, mix the cannabutter with the sugars until well-combined.
  • Stir in vanilla and egg until incorporated.
  • Add the flour, baking soda, and salt. Please read the recipe note about properly measuring flour.
  • Mix the dough until just combined. The dough should be soft and a little sticky but not overly sticky.
  • Stir in chocolate chips.
  • Scoop out 1.5 tablespoons of dough (medium cookie scoop) and place 2 inches apart on the baking sheet.
  • Bake for 7-10 minutes, or until cookies are set. They will be puffy and still look a little underbaked in the middle.

recipes.name: Pot Brownies
recipes.description: Behold! The perfect combination of deliciousness and dopeness
recipes.ingredients:
• ½ cupcannabutter
  • 1 cup sugar (or any sweetener)
  • 2 eggs
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • ¼ teaspoon baking powder
  • ⅓ cup cocoa powder
  • ¼ teaspoon salt
  • ½ cup of flour (or almond flour)
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 350° F or 180° C.
  • Mix the melted butter and sugar until well blended.
  • Add eggs and vanilla; stir just until blended.
  • Mix all dry ingredients in a separate bowl.
  • Stir dry ingredients into the butter/sugar mixture.
  • Pour into greased 9 x 9 square pan.
  • Bake for 20 minutes or until sides just start to pull away from the pan.
  • Cool completely before cutting.

recipes.name: Infused Grilled Cheese
recipes.description: Quick and easy cannabis-infused grilled cheese recipe
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 slices bread
  • 2 slices cheddar cheese
  • 2 tsp cannabutter
  • 1 tbsp butter
recipes.instructions:
• Evenly spread the regular butter on one side of both pieces of bread. Next, spread the cannabis butter on the other side of the bread.
  • Place the slice of cheddar cheese on the canna-butter side of the bread. Put the two slices of bread together with the canna-butter side in the middle.
  • On medium heat, fry the grilled cheese until the cheese has melted and both sides are golden brown, about 3 minutes per side.

recipes.name: Gingerbread Cookies
recipes.description: Make your holidays special with this delicious cookies!
recipes.ingredients:
• Cookie
  • 1/2 cup cannabutter
  • 2 and 1/4 cups flour
  • 1/2 cup sugar
  • 1 Egg
  • 1/2 cup Molasses
  • 1 tsp Ground Cinammon
  • 1 tsp Ground Ginger
  • 1 tsp Ground Cloves
  • 1 tsp Ground Nutmeg
  • 1 tsp Baking Powder
  • 1/2 tsp Baking Soda
  • 1/2 tsp Salt

  • Icing
  • 2 and 1/4 cup finely powdered Sugar
  • 1/3 cup Milk
  • 2 large Egg Whites
recipes.instructions:
• In a large bowl, with a hand mixer at slow speed, mix the butter, flour, sugar, egg, molasses, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, nutmeg, baking powder, baking soda, and salt until well mixed.
  • Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
  • Preheat oven to 350°F.
  • On a lightly floured surface, working with half of the dough at a time, roll 1/8 inch thick. With floured cookie cutters, cut dough into shapes. Using a metal spatula or pancake turner, place cookies 1/2 inch apart on greased cookie sheets. Re-roll trimmings and continue to cut shapes. Remember to cut the right amount of cookies to keep your dose consistent to what you set in the calculator.  
  • Bake for 8 minutes, or until lightly browned. Transfer cookies to racks to cool completely.
  • To make the icing take the sugar, milk and egg whites and beat it until thick but able to pass through a piping bag or squirt bottle. If it is too thick add more milk gradually.
  • Have fun decorating the cookies however you want!

recipes.name: Trail Mix
recipes.description: A delicious combination of seeds and nuts infused with cannabis oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• ⅛ cup infused coconut oil
  • Nuts of your preference
recipes.instructions:
• Decarb your weed - Learn how
  • Grind your weed fine, you want to make a good surface area of exposure.
  • Add the ground weed to a canning jar with ¼ cup of coconut oil.
  • Seal the canning jar very tightly.
  • Add the canning jar in boiling water using low-medium (240° F - 115° C) heat for over 2 hours.
  • Put all the jar's content into a cheesecloth over a metal strainer.
  • Gather the cheesecloth and squeeze all the remaining liquid out.
  • Mix the coconut oil with some nuts.

recipes.name: Infused Honey
recipes.description: Infused honey is a great way to get cannabis into your favourite beverages or desserts.
recipes.ingredients:
• ½ cup of coconut oil
  • 3.5 ground weed
  • 300 g honey
recipes.instructions:
• Decarb your weed - Learn how to do
  • Grind your weed fine, you want to make a good surface area of exposure.
  • Add the ground weed to a canning jar with ½ cup of coconut oil.
  • Seal the canning jar very tightly.
  • Add the canning jar in boiling water using low-medium heat (240° F - 115° C) for over 2 hours.
  • Put all the jar's content into a cheesecloth over a metal strainer.
  • Gather the cheesecloth and squeeze all the remaining liquid out.
  • Add the coconut oil and the honey in the blend
  • Put and store all the mixture in a canning jar or mason jar

recipes.name: Infused Whiskey
recipes.description: Explore the flavour of the best whiskies with the glorious cannabis aroma.
recipes.ingredients:
• 750 ml bottle of bourbon whiskey
  • 7 g ground weed
recipes.instructions:
• Decarb your weed - Learn how to do
  • Pour the bottle of whiskey into a sealable jar (or pour out a little bit of whiskey to make up for the added volume of the weed) and add the ground weed.
  • Shake the bottle and let it sit, out of the sun, for at least 48 hours. Shake it up at least once a day until it has reached your desired potency - up to one month if possible. The longer it sits, the more potent it will be.
  • Pour the whiskey mixture into a glass container, using a cheesecloth to strain out all ground weed from the whiskey. Repeat this step as necessary to strain all of the whiskey from the ground weed, and discard the remaining weed.

recipes.name: Infused Chai
recipes.description: This warming, potent, cannabis chai tea recipe is a great way to enjoy your tea with an extra kick.
recipes.ingredients:
• Tea Bag
  • Milk
  • 0.5 ground weed
  • Ginger
  • Cardamom
  • Sugar or any sweetiner
recipes.instructions:
• Decarb your weed - Learn how
  • Start boiling some milk in a pot.
  • Lay out some cheesecloth
  • Mash up your ginger and spices
  • Put the cannabis with all your mashed spices in a cheesecloth and close it as a tea bag.
  • Steep the tea bag in the milk for two hours.
  • Pour the milk in a jug.
  • Now, it's time to prepare your mug, mix the milk with a black tea bag and add some sugar.

recipes.name: Infused Popcorn
recipes.description: The perfect salty snack to eat while watching your favorite movies
recipes.ingredients:
• ¼ cup cannabutter
  • ⅓ - ⅔ cups of Popcorn Kernels
  • Salt to taste
recipes.instructions:
• Heat the butter in a 2 to 3-quart saucepan or pot with a lid set over medium-high heat. Pour in popcorn kernels and sprinkle enough salt to lightly cover the layer of kernels. Remember, you can always add more salt later. Add the butter to the pot and cover with the lid.
  • As soon as the kernels start to pop, shake the pan back and forth across the burner constantly until the popping slows down. As soon as the pops are about 2 seconds apart, remove from the heat and pour it into a serving bowl. Taste, and season with additional salt if desired.

recipes.name: Infused Eggnog
recipes.description: It's time for that holiday cheer! Why not make it extra special?
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup Infused Milk
  • 4 Eggs
  • 6 tbsp Sugar
  • 1 cup Heavy Cream
  • 1 tsp Grated Nutmeg
  • 6 tbsp Bourbon (Optional)
  • Cinnamon for garnish
recipes.instructions:
• Separate the egg yolks from the egg whites.
  •  In a bowl, beat the egg yolks with the sugar until they look pale and the sugar is completely dissolved.
  • In a medium saucepan, over high heat, combine the milk, heavy cream and nutmeg and bring just to a boil, stirring occasionally. Remove from the heat and slowly temper the hot mixture into the yolks and sugar mixture. Then return everything to the pan and heat it until the mixture reaches 160 degrees F. Remove from the heat, stir in the bourbon/whiskey, pour into a medium mixing bowl, and set in the refrigerator to chill
  • In a medium mixing bowl, beat the egg whites to soft peaks. With the mixer running gradually add the 1 tablespoon of sugar and beat until stiff peaks form. Whisk the egg whites into the chilled mixture.
  • Serve in how many cups you defined as portions in the calculator to keep your dose consistent, and garnish it with cinnamon!

recipes.name: Infused Ghee
recipes.description: Cannabis-infused ghee (clarified butter) is a versatile cooking fat with a high smoke point. Perfect for sauteing, spreading on toast, or adding to your morning coffee. It stores longer than regular cannabutter and has a rich, nutty flavor.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup (2 sticks) unsalted butter
  • 3.5g cannabis, decarboxylated and ground
  • Cheesecloth for straining
  • Mason jar for storage
recipes.instructions:
• Melt butter in a saucepan over medium-low heat. It will begin to foam and crackle — that is the water evaporating.
  • Once the crackling subsides and the milk solids settle to the bottom and turn golden, add your decarboxylated cannabis.
  • Simmer on the lowest heat for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally. Do not let it burn.
  • Strain through cheesecloth into a mason jar, squeezing out all the fat.
  • Let cool at room temperature, then refrigerate. Ghee will solidify and keep for up to 3 months.

recipes.name: Infused Condensed Milk
recipes.description: Rich, sweet cannabis-infused condensed milk perfect for fudge, macaroons, and other desserts. A must-have essential for your edible kitchen.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 can (14 oz) sweetened condensed milk
  • 1 tbsp cannabutter or infused coconut oil
  • Sauce pan
  • Whisk
  • Mason jar
recipes.instructions:
• Make sure your cannabutter or infused coconut oil is ready. If not, prepare it first.
  • Pour the condensed milk into a saucepan over low heat.
  • Add the cannabutter or infused coconut oil and whisk until fully combined.
  • Keep stirring on low heat for 10-15 minutes. Do not let it boil.
  • Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
  • Transfer to a mason jar or airtight container. Store in the fridge for up to 2 weeks.

recipes.name: Cannabis Hot Chocolate
recipes.description: A rich, warming cannabis hot chocolate made with infused milk or coconut oil. Perfect for cold nights or winding down after a long day. Use your favorite hot cocoa recipe and simply swap in your infused base.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups infused milk (see Infused Milk recipe)
  • 3 tbsp unsweetened cocoa powder
  • 2 tbsp sugar or sweetener of choice
  • Pinch of salt
  • 1/4 tsp vanilla extract
  • Whipped cream for topping (optional)
recipes.instructions:
• Warm the infused milk in a small saucepan over medium-low heat. Do not boil.
  • Whisk in cocoa powder, sugar, and salt until fully dissolved and smooth.
  • Add vanilla extract and stir to combine.
  • Pour into mugs and top with whipped cream if desired.
  • Serve immediately and enjoy slowly — edibles take time to kick in.

recipes.name: Infused Cold Brew
recipes.description: Cannabis cold brew coffee is smooth, low-acid, and hits differently. Pair caffeine and THC for a productive morning or a creative afternoon session. Use your infused coconut oil to bind the THC since cold brew is water-based.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup coarse-ground coffee
  • 4 cups cold filtered water
  • 1 tsp infused coconut oil (see Infused Coconut Oil recipe)
  • Ice cubes
  • Milk or cream to taste
recipes.instructions:
• Combine ground coffee and cold water in a large jar. Stir to fully saturate the grounds.
  • Cover and refrigerate for 12-24 hours.
  • Strain through a fine mesh strainer or cheesecloth into a clean jar. Discard grounds.
  • To serve, fill a glass with ice and pour cold brew to taste (usually diluted 1:1 with water or milk).
  • Stir in 1 tsp of infused coconut oil until emulsified. You can use a small frother to blend it thoroughly.
  • Enjoy slowly — the effects combine with caffeine for a unique experience.

recipes.name: Weed Rice Krispie Treats
recipes.description: A classic cannabis edible that is easy to make, easy to dose, and loved by all. Rice Krispie treats are simple, no-bake, and can be cut into precise portions for consistent dosing. A great beginner edible recipe.
recipes.ingredients:
• 3 tbsp cannabutter (see Cannabutter recipe)
  • 1 bag (10 oz) marshmallows
  • 6 cups rice cereal (Rice Krispies or similar)
  • Pinch of salt
  • Non-stick cooking spray
recipes.instructions:
• Grease a 9x13-inch pan with cooking spray and set aside.
  • Melt cannabutter in a large pot over low heat. Keep the heat low to preserve THC.
  • Add marshmallows and stir constantly until fully melted and smooth. Remove from heat.
  • Quickly stir in the rice cereal and salt, mixing until fully coated.
  • Pour into the prepared pan and press flat with a greased spatula or your hands.
  • Let cool completely (about 30 minutes), then cut into 12 equal squares.
  • Store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days.

recipes.name: Cannabis Caramel Sauce
recipes.description: A silky, golden cannabis caramel sauce you can drizzle on ice cream, brownies, pancakes, or eat straight from the spoon. Made with cannabutter for easy infusion and rich flavor. Makes about 12 servings.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 6 tbsp cannabutter (see Cannabutter recipe)
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream, at room temperature
  • 1 tsp vanilla extract
  • 1/2 tsp sea salt
recipes.instructions:
• Heat sugar in a heavy-bottomed saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon until it melts and turns amber in color.
  • Once fully melted, add cannabutter all at once. The mixture will bubble vigorously — keep stirring.
  • Stir in the heavy cream slowly. Mixture will bubble again. Keep stirring until smooth.
  • Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract and sea salt.
  • Let cool for 10 minutes before using. Store in a jar in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
  • Reheat gently before serving. Divide into 12 portions and drizzle as a topping.

recipes.name: Infused Hummus
recipes.description: Creamy, smooth cannabis-infused hummus made with infused olive oil. A healthy, savory snack you can serve with pita, veggies, or crackers. Easy to make in a blender and easy to dose per serving.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 3 tbsp infused olive oil (see Infused Olive Oil recipe)
  • 3 tbsp tahini
  • 2 tbsp lemon juice
  • 1 clove garlic
  • 1/2 tsp salt
  • 1/4 tsp cumin
  • 2-3 tbsp cold water
  • Paprika and regular olive oil to garnish
recipes.instructions:
• Add chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and cumin to a food processor.
  • Blend for about 1 minute until roughly combined.
  • With the processor running, drizzle in the infused olive oil and cold water.
  • Blend for another 2-3 minutes until very smooth and creamy.
  • Taste and adjust salt or lemon to preference.
  • Transfer to a serving bowl, drizzle with regular olive oil, and dust with paprika.
  • Divide into 8 portions for accurate dosing. Store refrigerated for up to 5 days.

recipes.name: Infused Granola
recipes.description: Crunchy, golden cannabis-infused granola made with cannabutter or infused coconut oil. Perfect on yogurt, with milk, or as a trail mix-style snack. Bake a big batch and divide into portions for easy, consistent dosing throughout the week.
recipes.ingredients:
• 3 cups rolled oats
  • 1/2 cup nuts (almonds, pecans, or walnuts)
  • 1/4 cup seeds (pumpkin or sunflower)
  • 3 tbsp cannabutter or infused coconut oil, melted
  • 3 tbsp honey or maple syrup
  • 1 tsp vanilla extract
  • 1/2 tsp cinnamon
  • Pinch of salt
  • 1/2 cup dried fruit (optional, add after baking)
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C) — lower temperature preserves THC.
  • In a large bowl, mix oats, nuts, seeds, cinnamon, and salt.
  • In a small bowl, whisk together melted cannabutter, honey, and vanilla.
  • Pour wet ingredients over dry and toss until fully coated.
  • Spread on a parchment-lined baking sheet in a thin, even layer.
  • Bake for 30-35 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes, until golden and fragrant.
  • Remove and let cool completely — it will crisp up as it cools.
  • Stir in dried fruit if using. Divide into 12 portions for accurate dosing.

recipes.name: Cannabis Avocado Toast
recipes.description: Elevate your avocado toast game with a drizzle of infused olive oil. Simple, quick, and delicious. The healthy fats in avocado also help your body absorb THC more efficiently, making this one of the most bioavailable edible options.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 slices of thick bread (sourdough or whole grain)
  • 1 ripe avocado
  • 1 tbsp infused olive oil (see Infused Olive Oil recipe)
  • Juice of half a lemon
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Chili flakes, everything bagel seasoning, or fresh herbs to garnish
  • Optional: poached egg on top
recipes.instructions:
• Toast your bread to your preferred doneness.
  • Halve the avocado, remove the pit, and scoop the flesh into a bowl.
  • Mash with a fork. Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Mix briefly — keep it chunky.
  • Spread avocado mixture generously over toasted bread.
  • Drizzle infused olive oil over the top.
  • Garnish with chili flakes, seasoning, or herbs. Add a poached egg if desired.
  • Serves 2. Eat mindfully and wait at least an hour before considering another portion.

recipes.name: Cannabis Salad Dressing
recipes.description: A simple cannabis vinaigrette that turns any salad into an infused meal. Made with infused olive oil and a few pantry staples. Shake it up, drizzle it on, and you have a healthy, delicious cannabis edible with precise portion control.
recipes.ingredients:
• 3 tbsp infused olive oil (see Infused Olive Oil recipe)
  • 1 tbsp regular olive oil
  • 2 tbsp apple cider vinegar or red wine vinegar
  • 1 tsp Dijon mustard
  • 1 tsp honey
  • 1 small clove garlic, minced
  • Salt and pepper to taste
recipes.instructions:
• Combine all ingredients in a small jar with a lid.
  • Shake vigorously until emulsified and well combined.
  • Taste and adjust acid or sweetness to your preference.
  • Drizzle over salad right before serving — do not dress salad ahead of time.
  • This recipe makes 4 portions. Keep the dressing jar in the fridge for up to 1 week.
  • Shake before each use as the oil and vinegar will separate.

recipes.name: Infused Chocolate Bark
recipes.description: Dark chocolate bark infused with cannabutter and topped with your favorite mix-ins. Keto-friendly, easy to make, and beautiful as a gift or treat. Chocolate is an ideal edible vehicle — it masks the cannabis flavor and is easy to portion precisely.
recipes.ingredients:
• 200g dark chocolate (85% cacao or higher for keto)
  • 1 tbsp cannabutter, softened (see Cannabutter recipe)
  • 1/4 cup toppings: sea salt flakes, chopped nuts, dried cranberries, or cacao nibs
recipes.instructions:
• Melt dark chocolate in a heatproof bowl set over a pot of simmering water (double boiler), stirring until smooth.
  • Remove from heat and stir in softened cannabutter until fully incorporated.
  • Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Pour the chocolate mixture and spread into an even layer about 1/4 inch thick.
  • Quickly sprinkle your chosen toppings over the surface.
  • Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes until completely set and firm.
  • Break into 12 roughly equal pieces. Store in the refrigerator in an airtight container for up to 2 weeks.

recipes.name: Cannabis Vegan Brownies
recipes.description: Rich fudgy brownies made with cannabis coconut oil — 100% plant-based.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup cannabis-infused coconut oil
  • 1½ cups cane sugar
  • 2 flax eggs (2 tbsp flax + 6 tbsp water)
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 1 cup flour
  • ½ cup cocoa powder
  • ½ tsp salt
  • ½ tsp baking powder
  • ½ cup vegan chocolate chips
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 350°F. Make flax eggs; rest 5 min.
  • Whisk cannabis oil, sugar, flax eggs and vanilla.
  • Fold in flour, cocoa, salt and baking powder.
  • Stir in chips. Pour into greased 8x8 pan.
  • Bake 25-30 min. Cool before cutting.

recipes.name: Infused Vegan Cheese Sauce
recipes.description: Creamy cashew cheese sauce with cannabis olive oil — great on pasta or nachos.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup raw cashews soaked 4h
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • 3 tbsp nutritional yeast
  • ½ tsp garlic powder
  • ½ tsp smoked paprika
  • 1 tsp lemon juice
  • ½ cup water
  • Salt
recipes.instructions:
• Drain cashews and blend with all ingredients until silky.
  • Warm in a saucepan over low heat.
  • Adjust seasoning and serve.

recipes.name: Cannabis Lentil Soup
recipes.description: Hearty red lentil soup finished with cannabis olive oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup red lentils
  • 1 onion diced
  • 3 garlic cloves
  • 2 carrots diced
  • 1 tsp cumin
  • 1 tsp coriander
  • ½ tsp turmeric
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • Salt, lemon
recipes.instructions:
• Sauté onion and garlic. Add carrots and spices.
  • Add lentils and broth. Simmer 25 min.
  • Blend half for creamier texture.
  • Off heat: stir in cannabis olive oil and lemon.

recipes.name: Infused Vegan Pancakes
recipes.description: Fluffy weekend pancakes with cannabis coconut oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup flour
  • 1 tbsp sugar
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • ½ tsp baking soda
  • Pinch salt
  • 1 cup oat milk
  • 1 tsp apple cider vinegar
  • 2 tbsp cannabis coconut oil
  • 1 tsp vanilla
recipes.instructions:
• Mix oat milk and vinegar; rest 5 min.
  • Combine dry ingredients.
  • Add cannabis oil and vanilla to oat milk mixture.
  • Combine wet and dry until just mixed.
  • Cook 2-3 min per side on non-stick pan.

recipes.name: Cannabis Sweet Potato Curry
recipes.description: Warming coconut sweet potato and chickpea curry with cannabis coconut oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 tbsp cannabis coconut oil
  • 1 onion
  • 3 garlic cloves
  • 1 tbsp ginger
  • 2 tbsp curry powder
  • 2 sweet potatoes cubed
  • 400ml coconut milk
  • 1 can chickpeas
  • 1 cup vegetable broth
  • Salt, lime, cilantro
recipes.instructions:
• Sauté onion, garlic, ginger. Add curry powder.
  • Add sweet potatoes, coconut milk and broth. Simmer 20 min.
  • Add chickpeas; cook 5 min more.
  • Off heat: stir in cannabis coconut oil, lime and cilantro.

recipes.name: Infused Jackfruit Tacos
recipes.description: Pulled jackfruit tacos with smoky spices and cannabis olive oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cans young jackfruit drained
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • 1 tsp smoked paprika
  • 1 tsp cumin
  • 1 tsp garlic powder
  • ½ tsp chili powder
  • 8 corn tortillas
  • Avocado, salsa, lime
recipes.instructions:
• Shred jackfruit with a fork.
  • Season and pan-fry until edges caramelise.
  • Off heat: stir through cannabis olive oil.
  • Serve in warm tortillas with avocado and salsa.

recipes.name: Cannabis Vegan Chocolate Mousse
recipes.description: Silky avocado chocolate mousse with cannabis coconut oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 ripe avocados
  • ¼ cup cocoa powder
  • ¼ cup maple syrup
  • 2 tbsp cannabis coconut oil
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • Pinch salt
recipes.instructions:
• Blend all ingredients until smooth.
  • Taste and adjust sweetness.
  • Chill 1 hour before serving.
  • Top with berries or coconut cream.

recipes.name: Infused Vegan Mac and Cheese
recipes.description: Comforting plant-based mac with cashew-cannabis sauce.
recipes.ingredients:
• 300g macaroni
  • 1 cup soaked cashews
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • 3 tbsp nutritional yeast
  • 1 tsp garlic powder
  • 1 tsp onion powder
  • ½ tsp turmeric
  • 1 cup pasta water
  • Salt
recipes.instructions:
• Cook pasta; reserve 1 cup water.
  • Blend cashews, cannabis oil, nutritional yeast, spices and ½ cup water until smooth.
  • Toss drained pasta with sauce over low heat, adding water as needed.
  • Season and serve.

recipes.name: Cannabis Coconut Milk Ice Cream
recipes.description: Creamy 3-ingredient vegan ice cream with cannabis coconut oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cans full-fat coconut milk chilled overnight
  • 3 tbsp cannabis coconut oil
  • ½ cup maple syrup
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • Pinch salt
recipes.instructions:
• Scoop solid cream from top of cans and beat until fluffy.
  • Fold in cannabis oil, maple syrup, vanilla and salt.
  • Freeze 4-6 hours. Let sit 5 min before scooping.

recipes.name: Infused Chickpea Stew
recipes.description: Tomato-based chickpea stew finished with cannabis olive oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cans chickpeas
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • 1 onion
  • 4 garlic cloves
  • 1 tsp smoked paprika
  • 1 tsp cumin
  • ½ tsp cayenne
  • 1 can crushed tomatoes
  • 1 cup vegetable broth
  • Parsley
recipes.instructions:
• Sauté onion and garlic. Add spices.
  • Add chickpeas, tomatoes and broth. Simmer 20 min.
  • Off heat: stir in cannabis olive oil. Season and garnish.

recipes.name: Cannabis Vegan Protein Balls
recipes.description: No-bake energy balls with peanut butter and cannabis coconut oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup oats
  • ½ cup peanut butter
  • 3 tbsp cannabis coconut oil
  • 3 tbsp maple syrup
  • 2 tbsp flaxseed
  • 2 tbsp vegan protein powder
  • ½ cup vegan chocolate chips
  • 1 tsp vanilla
recipes.instructions:
• Mix all ingredients until combined. Chill 15 min if sticky.
  • Roll into tablespoon-sized balls.
  • Refrigerate 30 min before serving. Keeps 1 week chilled.

recipes.name: Infused Vegan Pesto Zoodles
recipes.description: Spiralized zucchini with basil pesto made with cannabis olive oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 4 zucchinis spiralized
  • 2 cups fresh basil
  • 3 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • ¼ cup pine nuts
  • 3 garlic cloves
  • 1 tbsp lemon juice
  • Salt, pepper
  • Cherry tomatoes
recipes.instructions:
• Blend basil, nuts, garlic, lemon and cannabis oil. Season.
  • Briefly sauté zucchini noodles 1-2 min (or serve raw).
  • Toss with pesto and top with cherry tomatoes.

recipes.name: Cannabis Black Bean Soup
recipes.description: Smoky black bean soup finished with cannabis olive oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cans black beans
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • 1 onion
  • 4 garlic cloves
  • 1 jalapeño
  • 2 tsp cumin
  • 1 tsp smoked paprika
  • 3 cups vegetable broth
  • Lime, cilantro
recipes.instructions:
• Sauté onion, garlic, jalapeño. Add spices.
  • Add beans and broth. Simmer 20 min.
  • Blend half, stir back in.
  • Off heat: stir in cannabis oil and lime. Serve with cilantro.

recipes.name: Infused Vegan Banana Ice Cream
recipes.description: One-ingredient nice cream with cannabis coconut oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 4 very ripe bananas frozen
  • 2 tbsp cannabis coconut oil
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • Optional: peanut butter or cocoa
recipes.instructions:
• Blend frozen banana until smooth and creamy.
  • Add cannabis oil and vanilla; blend again.
  • Add optional mix-ins and pulse.
  • Serve as soft-serve or freeze 1h for scoopable texture.

recipes.name: Cannabis Roasted Vegetable Medley
recipes.description: Colourful sheet-pan vegetables drizzled with cannabis olive oil after roasting.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 red pepper cubed
  • 1 zucchini cubed
  • 1 red onion wedged
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes
  • 200g broccoli florets
  • 2 tbsp olive oil
  • 1 tsp Italian seasoning
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil to finish
  • Fresh basil
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 425°F.
  • Toss veg with regular olive oil, seasoning, salt and pepper.
  • Roast 25-30 min tossing halfway.
  • Drizzle with cannabis olive oil and scatter basil.

recipes.name: Cannabis Keto Bacon Bites
recipes.description: Crispy bacon-wrapped bites with cream cheese and cannabis butter.
recipes.ingredients:
• 12 bacon strips
  • 100g cream cheese softened
  • 2 tbsp cannabis butter
  • 1 tsp garlic powder
  • ½ tsp smoked paprika
  • 12 jalapeño slices
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 400°F.
  • Mix cream cheese, cannabis butter, garlic and paprika.
  • Spread on bacon, top with jalapeño, roll and secure.
  • Bake 20-25 min until crispy.

recipes.name: Infused Keto Chicken Wings
recipes.description: Crispy baked wings tossed in cannabis butter hot sauce.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1kg chicken wings
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • 1 tsp garlic powder
  • Salt and pepper
  • 3 tbsp cannabis butter melted
  • 3 tbsp hot sauce
  • 1 tsp apple cider vinegar
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 425°F. Toss wings with baking powder and spices.
  • Bake on a rack 45-50 min flipping halfway.
  • Whisk cannabis butter, hot sauce and vinegar.
  • Toss hot wings in sauce.

recipes.name: Cannabis Keto Deviled Eggs
recipes.description: Classic deviled eggs with cannabis butter yolk filling.
recipes.ingredients:
• 6 hard-boiled eggs
  • 2 tbsp cannabis butter softened
  • 2 tbsp mayonnaise
  • 1 tsp Dijon mustard
  • 1 tsp apple cider vinegar
  • Salt, pepper
  • Paprika and chives
recipes.instructions:
• Halve eggs; scoop yolks.
  • Mash yolks with cannabis butter, mayo, mustard, vinegar, salt and pepper.
  • Pipe back into whites.
  • Sprinkle with paprika and chives.

recipes.name: Infused Keto Stuffed Mushrooms
recipes.description: Mushrooms filled with cream cheese and cannabis butter.
recipes.ingredients:
• 12 large mushrooms stems removed
  • 100g cream cheese
  • 2 tbsp cannabis butter
  • 3 garlic cloves minced
  • 50g parmesan grated
  • 2 tbsp parsley
  • Salt, pepper
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 375°F.
  • Sauté garlic in cannabis butter 1 min.
  • Mix with cream cheese, parmesan, parsley, salt and pepper.
  • Spoon into caps. Bake 20-25 min.

recipes.name: Cannabis Keto Beef Chili
recipes.description: Low-carb beef chili spiked with cannabis olive oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 500g ground beef
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • 1 onion
  • 4 garlic cloves
  • 1 tbsp chili powder
  • 1 tsp cumin
  • 1 tsp smoked paprika
  • 1 can crushed tomatoes
  • 1 cup beef broth
  • Sour cream to serve
recipes.instructions:
• Brown beef; drain fat.
  • Add onion and garlic; cook until soft.
  • Add spices, tomatoes and broth. Simmer 30 min.
  • Off heat: stir in cannabis oil. Serve with sour cream.

recipes.name: Infused Keto Zucchini Chips
recipes.description: Thin crispy baked zucchini chips with cannabis olive oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 zucchinis very thinly sliced
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • ½ tsp garlic powder
  • ½ tsp onion powder
  • Salt, pepper
  • ¼ cup parmesan grated
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 225°F.
  • Toss zucchini with cannabis oil and seasoning.
  • Arrange in single layer; sprinkle parmesan.
  • Bake 2-2.5h until crispy. Cool on pan.

recipes.name: Cannabis Keto Waffles
recipes.description: Fluffy almond flour waffles with cannabis butter.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup almond flour
  • 2 tbsp coconut flour
  • 2 eggs
  • 2 tbsp cannabis butter melted
  • ¼ cup almond milk
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • Pinch salt
  • 1 tsp vanilla
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat waffle iron.
  • Whisk eggs, cannabis butter, milk and vanilla.
  • Add flours, baking powder and salt.
  • Cook in waffle iron until golden. Serve with sugar-free syrup.

recipes.name: Infused Keto Salmon Patties
recipes.description: Pan-fried salmon patties with cannabis butter.
recipes.ingredients:
• 400g cooked salmon flaked
  • 1 egg
  • 3 tbsp almond flour
  • 2 tbsp cannabis butter
  • 2 tbsp mayonnaise
  • 1 tbsp Dijon mustard
  • 2 spring onions
  • Salt, pepper, lemon
recipes.instructions:
• Mix salmon, egg, almond flour, mayo, mustard and spring onions.
  • Form 6 patties.
  • Melt cannabis butter in skillet.
  • Cook 3-4 min per side until golden. Serve with lemon.

recipes.name: Cannabis Keto Spinach Dip
recipes.description: Warm cheesy spinach dip with cannabis butter.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 tbsp cannabis butter
  • 300g frozen spinach thawed and squeezed
  • 200g cream cheese
  • ½ cup sour cream
  • ½ cup mozzarella shredded
  • ¼ cup parmesan
  • 2 garlic cloves
  • Salt, pepper
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 375°F.
  • Sauté garlic in cannabis butter. Add spinach.
  • Stir in cream cheese, sour cream and half the mozzarella.
  • Transfer to baking dish, top with remaining cheese.
  • Bake 20-25 min until bubbling.

recipes.name: Infused Keto Almond Flour Cake
recipes.description: Moist keto cake with almond flour and cannabis butter.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups almond flour
  • 3 eggs
  • ½ cup cannabis butter melted
  • ½ cup erythritol
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • Pinch salt
  • Zest of 1 lemon
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease 8-inch pan.
  • Beat eggs, cannabis butter, sweetener and vanilla.
  • Stir in almond flour, baking powder, salt and lemon zest.
  • Bake 30-35 min. Cool completely.

recipes.name: Cannabis Sparkling Lemonade
recipes.description: Fizzy lemonade with cannabis simple syrup.
recipes.ingredients:
• Juice of 4 lemons
  • 2 tbsp cannabis simple syrup
  • 1 cup sparkling water
  • Ice
  • Lemon and mint to garnish
recipes.instructions:
• Make cannabis syrup: dissolve sugar in water over heat, cool, stir in cannabis tincture.
  • Combine lemon juice and cannabis syrup.
  • Add ice, top with sparkling water. Garnish.

recipes.name: Infused Virgin Mojito
recipes.description: Minty lime mocktail with cannabis simple syrup.
recipes.ingredients:
• Juice of 2 limes
  • 2 tbsp cannabis simple syrup
  • 10 fresh mint leaves
  • ½ cup sparkling water
  • Ice
  • Lime wedge
recipes.instructions:
• Muddle mint in a glass.
  • Add ice, lime juice and cannabis syrup.
  • Top with sparkling water. Garnish with lime.

recipes.name: Cannabis Cucumber Mint Cooler
recipes.description: Refreshing cucumber mint mocktail with cannabis syrup.
recipes.ingredients:
• ½ cucumber sliced
  • 10 mint leaves
  • 2 tbsp cannabis simple syrup
  • Juice of 1 lime
  • 1 cup sparkling water
  • Ice
recipes.instructions:
• Muddle cucumber and mint with syrup and lime.
  • Shake with ice and strain.
  • Top with sparkling water.

recipes.name: Infused Watermelon Slush
recipes.description: Blended watermelon slush with cannabis honey.
recipes.ingredients:
• 4 cups frozen watermelon
  • 2 tbsp cannabis honey
  • Juice of 1 lime
  • Pinch salt
  • Fresh mint
recipes.instructions:
• Blend watermelon, cannabis honey, lime and salt until smooth.
  • Pour into glasses and top with mint.

recipes.name: Cannabis Lavender Lemonade
recipes.description: Floral lemonade with cannabis lavender syrup.
recipes.ingredients:
• Juice of 4 lemons
  • 2 tbsp cannabis lavender syrup
  • 2 cups cold water
  • Ice
  • Dried lavender
recipes.instructions:
• Simmer water, sugar and lavender 10 min; strain; add cannabis tincture.
  • Mix lemon juice, syrup and water. Pour over ice.

recipes.name: Infused Tropical Punch
recipes.description: Mango, pineapple and passion fruit punch with cannabis syrup.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup mango juice
  • 1 cup pineapple juice
  • ½ cup passion fruit juice
  • 2 tbsp cannabis simple syrup
  • Juice of 1 lime
  • Sparkling water
  • Ice
recipes.instructions:
• Mix juices, cannabis syrup and lime in a pitcher.
  • Pour over ice and top with sparkling water.

recipes.name: Cannabis Strawberry Basil Smash
recipes.description: Summery strawberry and basil mocktail with cannabis honey.
recipes.ingredients:
• 6 strawberries hulled
  • 6 basil leaves
  • 2 tbsp cannabis honey
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • Sparkling water
  • Ice
recipes.instructions:
• Muddle strawberries and basil with cannabis honey and lemon.
  • Strain over ice. Top with sparkling water.

recipes.name: Infused Hibiscus Tea
recipes.description: Deep ruby hibiscus iced tea with cannabis honey.
recipes.ingredients:
• 3 tbsp dried hibiscus
  • 4 cups boiling water
  • 2 tbsp cannabis honey
  • Juice of 1 lime
  • Ice
  • Orange slices
recipes.instructions:
• Steep hibiscus 10 min. Strain and cool.
  • Stir in cannabis honey and lime. Serve over ice.

recipes.name: Cannabis Peach Iced Tea
recipes.description: Southern peach iced tea with cannabis simple syrup.
recipes.ingredients:
• 4 black tea bags
  • 4 cups hot water
  • 2 ripe peaches sliced
  • 2 tbsp cannabis simple syrup
  • Juice of ½ lemon
  • Ice
recipes.instructions:
• Brew tea 5 min. Add peaches; cool and refrigerate 1h.
  • Strain; stir in cannabis syrup and lemon. Serve over ice.

recipes.name: Infused Mango Lassi
recipes.description: Creamy mango lassi with cannabis honey.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups ripe mango
  • 1 cup yoghurt
  • ½ cup milk
  • 2 tbsp cannabis honey
  • ½ tsp cardamom
  • Pinch salt
recipes.instructions:
• Blend all ingredients until smooth.
  • Taste and adjust. Pour into glasses.

recipes.name: Cannabis Rose Lemonade
recipes.description: Elegant floral lemonade with cannabis tincture.
recipes.ingredients:
• Juice of 4 lemons
  • 2 tbsp rose syrup
  • 1 tsp cannabis tincture
  • 2 cups sparkling water
  • Ice
  • Dried rose petals
recipes.instructions:
• Mix lemon juice, rose syrup and cannabis tincture.
  • Add sparkling water over ice. Garnish with rose petals.

recipes.name: Infused Pineapple Ginger Fizz
recipes.description: Tropical pineapple ginger fizz with cannabis honey.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup fresh pineapple juice
  • 1 inch ginger grated
  • 2 tbsp cannabis honey
  • Juice of 1 lime
  • Sparkling water
  • Ice
recipes.instructions:
• Mix pineapple juice, ginger, cannabis honey and lime. Strain.
  • Pour over ice and top with sparkling water.

recipes.name: Cannabis Cranberry Spritzer
recipes.description: Festive cranberry spritzer with cannabis simple syrup.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup cranberry juice
  • 2 tbsp cannabis simple syrup
  • Juice of ½ orange
  • Sparkling water
  • Ice
  • Cranberries, rosemary
recipes.instructions:
• Mix cranberry juice, cannabis syrup and orange juice.
  • Add ice and sparkling water. Garnish.

recipes.name: Infused Matcha Cooler
recipes.description: Cold matcha with cannabis honey and oat milk.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 tsp matcha powder
  • 2 tbsp hot water
  • 1 cup cold oat milk
  • 2 tbsp cannabis honey
  • Ice
recipes.instructions:
• Whisk matcha with hot water until smooth. Add cannabis honey.
  • Fill glass with ice and oat milk. Pour matcha over top.

recipes.name: Cannabis Passion Fruit Lemonade
recipes.description: Tropical lemonade with passion fruit and cannabis honey.
recipes.ingredients:
• Pulp of 4 passion fruits
  • Juice of 3 lemons
  • 2 tbsp cannabis honey
  • 1½ cups sparkling water
  • Ice
  • Mint
recipes.instructions:
• Mix passion fruit, lemon and cannabis honey until dissolved.
  • Pour over ice and top with sparkling water. Garnish.

recipes.name: Infused Cherry Limeade
recipes.description: Cherry and lime mocktail with cannabis simple syrup.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup tart cherry juice
  • Juice of 3 limes
  • 2 tbsp cannabis simple syrup
  • Sparkling water
  • Ice
  • Lime, cherries
recipes.instructions:
• Mix cherry juice, lime and cannabis syrup.
  • Pour over ice and top with sparkling water. Garnish.

recipes.name: Cannabis Mint Green Tea
recipes.description: Cool mint green tea with cannabis honey.
recipes.ingredients:
• 3 green tea bags
  • 4 cups hot water
  • 2 tbsp cannabis honey
  • 10 mint leaves
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • Ice
recipes.instructions:
• Brew green tea 3 min. Stir in cannabis honey while warm.
  • Add mint and lemon. Cool, refrigerate. Serve over ice.

recipes.name: Infused Blueberry Lemonade
recipes.description: Purple blueberry lemonade with cannabis syrup.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup blueberries
  • Juice of 4 lemons
  • 2 tbsp cannabis simple syrup
  • 2 cups cold water
  • Ice
recipes.instructions:
• Simmer blueberries with ¼ cup water; strain.
  • Mix blueberry juice, lemon, cannabis syrup and water. Serve over ice.

recipes.name: Cannabis Ginger Turmeric Tonic
recipes.description: Wellness tonic with ginger, turmeric and cannabis honey.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 inch ginger grated
  • ½ tsp turmeric
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • 2 tbsp cannabis honey
  • 1 cup warm water
  • Pinch black pepper
  • Sparkling water
recipes.instructions:
• Combine ginger, turmeric, lemon and cannabis honey in warm water.
  • Cool, add ice, top with sparkling water. Add black pepper.

recipes.name: Infused Coconut Lime Agua Fresca
recipes.description: Light coconut lime agua fresca with cannabis honey.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup coconut water
  • Juice of 3 limes
  • 1 cup sparkling water
  • 2 tbsp cannabis honey
  • Ice
  • Lime zest, coconut flakes
recipes.instructions:
• Mix coconut water, lime and cannabis honey until dissolved.
  • Add sparkling water over ice. Garnish.

recipes.name: Cannabis Cheesecake
recipes.description: Creamy baked cheesecake with cannabis butter crust.
recipes.ingredients:
• Crust: 200g digestive biscuits crushed
  • 80g cannabis butter melted
  • Filling: 600g cream cheese
  • ¾ cup caster sugar
  • 3 eggs
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 200ml sour cream
  • 2 tbsp flour
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 325°F. Mix biscuits and cannabis butter; press into 9-inch springform.
  • Beat cream cheese and sugar. Add eggs one at a time.
  • Mix in vanilla, sour cream and flour. Pour over crust.
  • Bake in water bath 55-60 min. Cool in oven 1h.
  • Refrigerate 4h before serving.

recipes.name: Infused Tiramisu
recipes.description: Classic tiramisu with cannabis mascarpone cream.
recipes.ingredients:
• 3 egg yolks
  • 75g sugar
  • 250g mascarpone
  • 2 tbsp cannabis butter softened
  • 200ml strong espresso cooled
  • 200g ladyfingers
  • 2 tbsp cocoa powder
  • 1 tsp vanilla
recipes.instructions:
• Beat yolks and sugar until pale. Beat in mascarpone, cannabis butter and vanilla.
  • Dip ladyfingers in espresso; layer in dish.
  • Spread half the cream. Repeat layers.
  • Dust with cocoa. Refrigerate 4h+

recipes.name: Cannabis Apple Pie
recipes.description: Classic double-crust apple pie with cannabis butter pastry.
recipes.ingredients:
• Pastry: 2½ cups flour
  • 200g cannabis butter cold cubed
  • 6-8 tbsp ice water
  • ½ tsp salt
  • Filling: 6 apples peeled sliced
  • ¾ cup sugar
  • 2 tsp cinnamon
  • ¼ tsp nutmeg
  • 2 tbsp cornstarch
recipes.instructions:
• Make pastry; chill 1h. Preheat oven to 375°F.
  • Mix apple filling.
  • Line pan with half the dough. Add filling.
  • Top with second dough sheet; seal and crimp.
  • Bake 50-60 min until golden.

recipes.name: Infused Chocolate Lava Cake
recipes.description: Molten chocolate cakes with cannabis butter centre.
recipes.ingredients:
• 100g dark chocolate
  • 100g cannabis butter
  • 2 eggs + 2 yolks
  • 80g icing sugar
  • 40g flour
  • Pinch salt
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 425°F. Grease 4 ramekins.
  • Melt chocolate and cannabis butter. Cool slightly.
  • Whisk in eggs, yolks and icing sugar. Fold in flour and salt.
  • Fill ramekins. Chill 30 min.
  • Bake 12-13 min. Rest 1 min then invert.

recipes.name: Cannabis Lemon Bars
recipes.description: Tangy lemon curd on cannabis shortbread.
recipes.ingredients:
• Base: 1 cup flour
  • 115g cannabis butter
  • ¼ cup icing sugar
  • Pinch salt
  • Filling: 3 eggs
  • 1 cup caster sugar
  • Juice and zest of 3 lemons
  • 3 tbsp flour
  • Icing sugar to dust
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 350°F. Press base into 8x8 pan. Bake 18 min.
  • Whisk filling ingredients. Pour over hot base.
  • Bake 20-22 min until set. Cool and refrigerate.
  • Dust with icing sugar and cut into bars.

recipes.name: Infused Carrot Cake
recipes.description: Spiced moist carrot cake with cannabis oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups flour
  • 3 eggs
  • 1½ cups sugar
  • 1 cup cannabis vegetable oil
  • 2 tsp vanilla
  • 3 cups grated carrot
  • 1½ tsp baking powder
  • 1 tsp cinnamon
  • ½ tsp nutmeg
  • Frosting: 250g cream cheese, 1 cup icing sugar, 1 tsp vanilla
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 350°F. Whisk eggs, sugar, cannabis oil and vanilla.
  • Fold in flour, spices and grated carrot.
  • Bake in two 8-inch pans 30-35 min. Cool completely.
  • Beat frosting; fill and cover cake.

recipes.name: Cannabis Coconut Macaroons
recipes.description: Chewy coconut macaroons with cannabis condensed milk.
recipes.ingredients:
• 3 cups desiccated coconut
  • ½ cup cannabis condensed milk
  • 2 egg whites
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • Pinch salt
  • 100g dark chocolate for dipping
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 325°F.
  • Mix coconut, cannabis condensed milk, vanilla and salt.
  • Fold in stiff egg whites.
  • Scoop onto lined tray. Bake 18-20 min.
  • Dip bases in melted chocolate when cool.

recipes.name: Infused Fudge
recipes.description: Melt-in-your-mouth fudge with cannabis condensed milk.
recipes.ingredients:
• 400g dark chocolate chopped
  • 400g cannabis condensed milk
  • 2 tbsp butter
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • Pinch sea salt
recipes.instructions:
• Melt chocolate, cannabis condensed milk and butter over low heat.
  • Stir in vanilla.
  • Pour into lined 8x8 pan. Sprinkle sea salt.
  • Refrigerate 3-4h. Cut into squares.

recipes.name: Cannabis Blondies
recipes.description: Butterscotch blondies with cannabis brown butter.
recipes.ingredients:
• ½ cup cannabis butter browned
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • 1 egg + 1 yolk
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • 1 cup flour
  • ½ tsp baking powder
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • ¾ cup white chocolate chips
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 350°F. Whisk cannabis brown butter and brown sugar.
  • Add egg, yolk and vanilla. Fold in flour, baking powder, salt and chips.
  • Bake in lined 8x8 pan 22-25 min. Do not overbake.
  • Cool completely before cutting.

recipes.name: Infused Donut Holes
recipes.description: Fluffy fried donut holes with cannabis cinnamon sugar coating.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup flour
  • 1½ tsp baking powder
  • 3 tbsp sugar
  • Pinch salt
  • ½ cup milk
  • 1 egg
  • 1 tbsp cannabis butter melted
  • Oil for frying
  • Coating: ½ cup sugar, 1 tsp cinnamon, 1 tbsp cannabis butter melted
recipes.instructions:
• Mix dry ingredients. Whisk milk, egg and cannabis butter; add to dry.
  • Heat oil to 350°F. Drop tablespoons of batter; fry 2-3 min until golden.
  • Drain, brush with cannabis butter, roll in cinnamon sugar.

recipes.name: Cannabis Peach Cobbler
recipes.description: Southern peach cobbler with cannabis butter biscuit topping.
recipes.ingredients:
• 5 peaches sliced
  • ¼ cup sugar
  • 1 tsp lemon juice
  • ½ tsp cinnamon
  • Topping: 1 cup flour
  • ¼ cup sugar
  • 1½ tsp baking powder
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • ½ cup milk
  • 4 tbsp cannabis butter melted
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 375°F. Toss peaches with sugar, lemon and cinnamon in a baking dish.
  • Mix topping into a thick batter. Drop spoonfuls over peaches.
  • Bake 40-45 min until golden. Serve warm.

recipes.name: Infused Baklava
recipes.description: Flaky phyllo layered with spiced nuts and cannabis honey syrup.
recipes.ingredients:
• 400g phyllo dough
  • 200g cannabis butter melted
  • 300g mixed walnuts and pistachios chopped
  • 1 tsp cinnamon
  • Syrup: 1 cup sugar, 1 cup water, ½ cup honey, 1 tsp rose water
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 350°F. Layer phyllo sheets brushing each with cannabis butter and nut mixture.
  • Score into diamonds. Bake 45-50 min until deep golden.
  • Simmer syrup 10 min; pour hot over hot baklava. Cool fully.

recipes.name: Cannabis Chocolate Fondue
recipes.description: Smooth chocolate fondue with cannabis cream.
recipes.ingredients:
• 300g dark chocolate chopped
  • 1 cup cannabis heavy cream
  • 2 tbsp butter
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • Pinch salt
  • Dippers: strawberries, banana, marshmallows, pretzels
recipes.instructions:
• Heat cannabis cream until steaming. Remove from heat; add chocolate.
  • Rest 2 min then stir until smooth. Add butter, vanilla and salt.
  • Transfer to fondue pot and serve with dippers.

recipes.name: Infused Strawberry Shortcake
recipes.description: Fluffy shortcake biscuits with cannabis butter and fresh strawberries.
recipes.ingredients:
• Shortcakes: 2 cups flour
  • 115g cannabis butter cold
  • 2 tbsp sugar
  • 1 tbsp baking powder
  • ½ tsp salt
  • ¾ cup cream
  • 1 egg
  • Topping: 500g strawberries with 2 tbsp sugar
  • 1 cup whipped cream
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 425°F. Cut cannabis butter into dry ingredients.
  • Add cream and egg until just combined. Drop onto baking sheet.
  • Bake 15 min. Split and fill with strawberries and whipped cream.

recipes.name: Cannabis Panna Cotta
recipes.description: Silky Italian cream pudding with cannabis cream.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups cannabis heavy cream
  • ¼ cup sugar
  • 2 tsp vanilla
  • 2½ tsp gelatine powder
  • 3 tbsp cold water
  • Berry coulis to serve
recipes.instructions:
• Bloom gelatine in cold water 5 min.
  • Heat cannabis cream and sugar until dissolved. Off heat: stir in vanilla and gelatine.
  • Pour into ramekins. Refrigerate 4h+.
  • Invert onto plates and serve with berry coulis.

recipes.name: Infused Churros
recipes.description: Crispy Spanish churros with cannabis butter dough.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup water
  • 115g cannabis butter
  • 1 tbsp sugar
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 1 cup flour
  • 3 eggs
  • Oil for frying
  • Coating: ½ cup sugar, 1 tsp cinnamon
  • Chocolate sauce to serve
recipes.instructions:
• Boil water, cannabis butter, sugar and salt. Add flour; stir until dough forms.
  • Cool 5 min then beat in eggs.
  • Pipe into hot oil (350°F). Fry 3-4 min until golden.
  • Roll in cinnamon sugar. Serve with chocolate sauce.

recipes.name: Cannabis Crepes
recipes.description: Thin French crepes with cannabis butter.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup flour
  • 2 eggs
  • 1½ cups milk
  • 2 tbsp cannabis butter melted
  • 1 tbsp sugar
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • Pinch salt
  • Fillings: Nutella, jam, fruit, cream
recipes.instructions:
• Blend all batter ingredients. Rest 30 min.
  • Cook thin layers in buttered non-stick pan 1-2 min per side.
  • Fill and fold as desired.

recipes.name: Infused Mango Sorbet
recipes.description: Vibrant dairy-free mango sorbet with cannabis syrup.
recipes.ingredients:
• 4 cups frozen mango
  • 2 tbsp cannabis simple syrup
  • Juice of 1 lime
  • Pinch salt
recipes.instructions:
• Blend frozen mango, cannabis syrup, lime and salt until smooth.
  • Serve as soft-serve or freeze 1h for scoopable texture.

recipes.name: Cannabis Cinnamon Rolls
recipes.description: Pillowy cinnamon rolls with cannabis butter filling and icing.
recipes.ingredients:
• Dough: 3 cups flour, 2¼ tsp yeast, ¼ cup sugar, 1 tsp salt, ¾ cup warm milk, 2 eggs, ¼ cup cannabis butter
  • Filling: 4 tbsp cannabis butter, ½ cup brown sugar, 2 tbsp cinnamon
  • Icing: 1 cup icing sugar, 2 tbsp cannabis butter, 2 tbsp milk
recipes.instructions:
• Mix and knead dough 8 min. Rise 1h.
  • Roll out, spread with cannabis butter, brown sugar and cinnamon.
  • Roll tightly, cut into 12. Rise 30 min. Bake at 375°F 20-25 min.
  • Drizzle with cannabis icing while warm.

recipes.name: Infused Coconut Pudding
recipes.description: Creamy coconut pudding with cannabis coconut milk.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups cannabis coconut milk
  • ¼ cup sugar
  • 3 tbsp cornstarch
  • ½ tsp vanilla
  • Pinch salt
  • Toasted coconut and mango to serve
recipes.instructions:
• Whisk all ingredients in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat stirring until thick (8-10 min).
  • Pour into bowls. Refrigerate 2h+.
  • Top with toasted coconut and mango.

recipes.name: Cannabis Shakshuka
recipes.description: Eggs poached in cannabis tomato sauce.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • 1 onion
  • 1 red pepper
  • 4 garlic cloves
  • 1 tsp cumin
  • 1 tsp paprika
  • ½ tsp chili flakes
  • 2 cans crushed tomatoes
  • 4-6 eggs
  • Parsley and feta
recipes.instructions:
• Sauté onion and pepper in cannabis oil. Add garlic and spices.
  • Add tomatoes. Simmer 15 min. Season.
  • Make wells; crack eggs in. Cover and cook 6-8 min.
  • Top with parsley and feta. Serve with bread.

recipes.name: Infused Mushroom Risotto
recipes.description: Creamy mushroom risotto with cannabis olive oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1½ cups arborio rice
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • 1 onion
  • 3 garlic cloves
  • 400g mixed mushrooms
  • ½ cup non-alcoholic white grape juice
  • 1L warm vegetable broth
  • 50g parmesan
  • 2 tbsp butter
  • Salt, pepper, thyme
recipes.instructions:
• Sauté onion in regular oil. Add garlic and mushrooms until golden.
  • Add rice; stir to coat. Add grape juice; cook until absorbed.
  • Add broth one ladle at a time stirring until each is absorbed (20 min).
  • Off heat: stir in parmesan, butter and cannabis olive oil.

recipes.name: Cannabis Thai Basil Chicken
recipes.description: Quick Thai basil stir-fry with cannabis sesame oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 500g ground chicken
  • 2 tbsp cannabis sesame oil
  • 4 garlic cloves
  • 2 bird's eye chillies
  • 2 tbsp soy sauce
  • 1 tbsp oyster sauce
  • 1 tsp fish sauce
  • 1 tsp sugar
  • 1 cup Thai basil
  • Steamed rice
recipes.instructions:
• Brown ground chicken in regular oil.
  • Add garlic and chillies. Add sauces and sugar.
  • Off heat: drizzle cannabis sesame oil, toss through basil. Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Infused Beef Tacos
recipes.description: Spiced beef tacos with cannabis butter.
recipes.ingredients:
• 500g ground beef
  • 2 tbsp cannabis butter
  • 1 onion
  • 3 garlic cloves
  • 1 tsp cumin
  • 1 tsp smoked paprika
  • ½ tsp chili powder
  • 8 corn tortillas
  • Shredded cabbage, salsa, lime, sour cream
recipes.instructions:
• Brown beef; drain fat. Add cannabis butter, onion and garlic.
  • Stir in spices. Cook 2 min.
  • Serve in warm tortillas with toppings.

recipes.name: Cannabis Chicken Caesar Salad
recipes.description: Restaurant-quality Caesar with cannabis dressing.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 chicken breasts grilled and sliced
  • 1 large romaine lettuce
  • ½ cup parmesan shaved
  • Croutons
  • Dressing: 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil, 1 tbsp lemon juice, 1 tsp Dijon, 1 tsp Worcestershire, 1 garlic clove, 3 tbsp mayo, salt
recipes.instructions:
• Whisk all dressing ingredients.
  • Toss romaine with dressing.
  • Top with chicken, parmesan and croutons.

recipes.name: Infused Cauliflower Fried Rice
recipes.description: Low-carb cauliflower fried rice with cannabis sesame oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 large cauliflower riced
  • 2 tbsp cannabis sesame oil
  • 3 eggs beaten
  • 1 cup frozen peas and corn
  • 3 garlic cloves
  • 3 tbsp soy sauce
  • Spring onions, sesame seeds
recipes.instructions:
• Stir-fry cauliflower rice 5 min. Set aside.
  • Scramble eggs in same pan. Add garlic and veg.
  • Return cauliflower; add soy sauce. Toss.
  • Off heat: drizzle cannabis sesame oil. Garnish.

recipes.name: Cannabis Minestrone Soup
recipes.description: Hearty Italian vegetable soup with cannabis olive oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • 1 onion
  • 2 carrots
  • 2 celery stalks
  • 3 garlic cloves
  • 1 zucchini
  • 1 can cannellini beans
  • 1 can crushed tomatoes
  • 1L vegetable broth
  • 1 cup small pasta
  • 2 cups spinach
  • Parmesan rind
recipes.instructions:
• Sauté onion, carrot and celery in regular oil.
  • Add garlic, zucchini and tomatoes. Add broth, beans and parmesan rind. Simmer 20 min.
  • Add pasta; cook al dente. Stir in spinach.
  • Off heat: drizzle cannabis olive oil.

recipes.name: Infused Pulled Pork Sliders
recipes.description: Slow-cooked pulled pork in cannabis BBQ sauce.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1kg pork shoulder
  • 1 tsp each smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, salt
  • Cannabis BBQ sauce: 1 cup BBQ sauce + 2 tbsp cannabis butter
  • Slider buns, coleslaw
recipes.instructions:
